fields.label: Type Mapping
fields.name: type_mapping
fields.info: Mapping from MIME type to document alias. Only files whose detected MIME type appears here are parsed; the alias is added to documentTypes on the enriched payload.

fields.label: Retain Binaries
fields.name: retain_binaries
fields.info: If true, the original binary is retained in the payload after parsing. If false, only the extracted text and metadata are forwarded.

fields.label: Summary Length
fields.name: summary_length
fields.info: Maximum number of characters kept as document summary. Use -1 to disable the summary cap.

fields.label: Max Length
fields.name: max_length
fields.info: Maximum number of characters of extracted text kept on the document. Text longer than this is truncated. Use -1 to disable truncation.

fields.label: Include Last Modified Date
fields.name: include_last_modified_date
fields.info: If true, the last modified date extracted from the document metadata is written to file.lastModifiedDate on the enriched payload.

fields.label: Include Content Type
fields.name: include_content_type
fields.info: If true, the Content-Type detected by Tika is written to document.contentType on the enriched payload.
